NCT03548935.name: STEP-1
NCT03548935.group: Adults BMI >=30 or >=27 with comorbidity, semaglutide 2.4 mg SC QW vs placebo (68 wk)

allOutcomes.title: Body weight % change at week 68 (placebo-corrected MD)

NCT03548935.snippet: Source: Wilding JPH et al. N Engl J Med 2021;384:989-1002 (STEP-1).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 1,961 adults with BMI >=30 (or >=27 with comorbidity), without diabetes, randomized 2:1 double-blind to semaglutide 2.4 mg SC weekly (n=1,306) or matching placebo (n=655) for 68 weeks with lifestyle intervention.

evidence.label: Primary - % Body Weight Change at Week 68
evidence.text: Mean percentage change in body weight at week 68: semaglutide -14.9% vs placebo -2.4%; estimated treatment difference MD -12.4 percentage points (95% CI -13.4 to -11.5; P<0.001). Co-primary endpoint met.

evidence.label: Secondary - >=5% / >=10% / >=15% Weight Loss
evidence.text: Participants achieving >=5% weight loss: semaglutide 86.4% vs placebo 31.5%; >=10% loss: 69.1% vs 12.0%; >=15% loss: 50.5% vs 4.9%. All P<0.001.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - stratified central randomization. D2 LOW - double-blind matched placebo and dosing schedule. D3 LOW - 94% primary completion. D4 LOW - treatment policy estimand + weight via calibrated scales at site. D5 LOW - SAP pre-specified and locked.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~Main phase:~* Male or female, age greater than or equal to 18 years at the time of signing informed consent~* Body mass index (BMI) greater than or equal to 30.0 kg/sqm or greater than or equal to 27.0 kg/sqm with the presence of at least one of the following weight-related comorbidities (treated or untreated): hypertension, dyslipidaemia, obstructive sleep apnoea or cardiovascular disease~* History of at least one self-reported unsuccessful dietary effort to lose body weigh...

NCT03611582.name: STEP-3
NCT03611582.group: Adults with obesity, semaglutide 2.4 mg SC QW + IBT vs placebo + IBT (68 wk)

allOutcomes.title: Body weight % change at week 68 (placebo-corrected MD, + IBT)

NCT03611582.snippet: Source: Wadden TA et al. JAMA 2021;325:1403-1413 (STEP-3).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 611 adults with obesity (BMI >=30 or >=27 with comorbidity) randomized 2:1 double-blind to semaglutide 2.4 mg SC weekly + intensive behavioural therapy (n=407) or placebo + IBT (n=204) for 68 weeks. Low-calorie diet for first 8 weeks.

evidence.label: Primary - % Body Weight Change at Week 68
evidence.text: Mean percentage change in body weight at week 68: semaglutide + IBT -16.0% vs placebo + IBT -5.7%; estimated treatment difference MD -10.3 percentage points (95% CI -12.0 to -8.6; P<0.001). Co-primary endpoint met.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - central stratified randomization. D2 LOW - double-blind matched placebo + identical IBT schedule. D3 LOW - 94% completion. D4 LOW - calibrated site scales + treatment policy estimand. D5 LOW - SAP locked.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Male or female, age more than or equal to 18 years at the time of signing informed consent~* Body mass index more than or equal to 30 kg/m^2 or more than or equal to 27 kg/m^2 with the presence of at least one of the following weight-related comorbidities (treated or untreated): hypertension, dyslipidaemia, obstructive sleep apnoea or cardiovascular disease~* History of at least one self-reported unsuccessful dietary effort to lose body weight~Exclusion Criteria:~* Hemog...

NCT03693430.name: STEP-5
NCT03693430.group: Adults BMI >=30 or >=27 with comorbidity, semaglutide 2.4 mg SC QW vs placebo (104 wk)

allOutcomes.title: Body weight % change at week 104 (placebo-corrected MD)

NCT03693430.snippet: Source: Garvey WT et al. Nat Med 2022;28:2083-2091 (STEP-5).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 304 adults with BMI >=30 (or >=27 with comorbidity), without diabetes, randomized 1:1 double-blind to semaglutide 2.4 mg SC weekly (n=152) or placebo (n=152) for 104 weeks.

evidence.label: Primary - % Body Weight Change at Week 104
evidence.text: Mean percentage change in body weight at week 104: semaglutide -15.2% vs placebo -2.6%; estimated treatment difference MD -12.6 percentage points (95% CI -14.4 to -10.8; P<0.0001). Co-primary endpoint met; weight loss sustained over 2 years.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - central stratified randomization. D2 LOW - double-blind matched placebo. D3 LOW - 82% completion (2-yr follow-up, treatment-policy imputation). D4 LOW - calibrated site scales. D5 LOW - SAP locked.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Male or female, age more than or equal to 18 years at the time of signing informed consent~* Body mass index (BMI) more than or equal to 30 kg/m^2 or more than or equal to 27 kg/m^2 with the presence of at least one of the following weight-related comorbidities (treated or untreated): hypertension, dyslipidaemia, obstructive sleep apnoea or cardiovascular disease~* History of at least one self-reported unsuccessful dietary effort to lose body weight~Exclusion criteria:~*...

NCT03552757.name: STEP-2
NCT03552757.group: Obesity + T2D, semaglutide 2.4 mg SC weekly vs placebo (68-wk % weight change MD, T2D population)

allOutcomes.title: Percent change in body weight from baseline at week 68 (MD, T2D population)

NCT03552757.snippet: Source: Davies M et al. Lancet 2021;397:971-984 (STEP-2, T2D obesity).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Male or female, age greater than or equal to 18 years at the time of signing informed consent~* Body Mass Index (BMI) greater than or equal to 27 kg/m^2 '~* History of at least one self-reported unsuccessful dietary effort to lose body weight~* Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes (haemoglobin A1c 7-10% (53-86 mmol/mol) (both inclusive)) 180 days or longer prior to the day of screening~Exclusion Criteria:~* A self-reported change in body weight greater than 5 kg (11 lbs) within...

title: RapidMeta Endocrinology | Semaglutide 2.4 mg for Obesity (STEP) v1.0
